title: ReAtomizer
description: Break down excess materials on your adventures into atoms!  Use those atoms to fabricate whatever items you want.
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## 🧬 Atomizer & Fabricator: Tired of overflowing chests and useless junk? Harness the power of atomic reconstruction! Atomizer & Fabricator introduces a futuristic crafting system that lets you break down unwanted items into pure atoms, then reassemble them into anything you desire. Feed your Atomizer with excess materials to reduce them to their base essence — atoms. With those, you can power the Fabricator, a precision machine capable of materializing any item from scratch. All you need is a Blueprint, crafted from paper and an example of the item you wish to replicate. Master the cycle of deconstruction and creation — recycle, refine, and reuse the world on an atomic level. --- ## **Features:** 🔹 Atomizer – breaks down items into reusable atoms. 🔹 Fabricator – uses atoms and blueprints to fabricate items. 🔹 Blueprint – craftable templates that define what can be made. Blueprints aren't consumed, neither is the base item used. 🔹 Automation - Comes with an off/on button that allows funneling the fabricated output item on a 20-tick delay as long as the atom cost is met. 🔹 A balanced, immersive loop of resource conversion and futuristic crafting. 🔹 9999 Storage Slot, the fabricators atom storage slot holds up to 9999 for automation use in a single slot. 🔹 Config menu, built into mod menu mod, enabling the player to adjust values to their liking.
